'''Sadie''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] working as a bartender in the [[Jungle Lust]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].
